backend.changelog: Pre-Generate close-foreign-docs prompt now runs BEFORE attempting to open the BOM root assembly, so leftover non-BOM documents that were blocking SolidWorks Connector's fresh root open get cleared first. Workstation Apply Update for CadBridge 1.8.49 strongly recommended to benefit from the new STEP+3DPDF foreign-docs fix and upfront non-BOM doc close (status row shows 'Closed N non-BOM document(s) before Generate' at the start of every run when applicable).

cadBridge.changelog: Moves the foreign-doc force-close pass from the 3D PDF post-loop (1.8.48) to the very start of Generate. Pre-1.8.49 the close fired late -- after STEP / PDF / Thumb completed in the main loop -- so users saw foreign documents stay open through most of the run and only get closed near the end. Now the close fires immediately when Generate starts; status row shows 'Closed N non-BOM document(s) before Generate' before any output is produced. Match logic unchanged (filename-only, case-insensitive, dirty docs skipped and titles logged). Side benefit: the BOM main loop's TryOpenByPlmid runs on a leaner SW doc list, which eliminates the activate-doc-race class of bug that 1.8.48 originally fixed by leaving the Pdf3dGenerator pre-cleanup as a belt-and-braces safety net.
